summary: The test suite covers all main functions and core requirements with good organization by function (Get-SecretConfig, Test-SecretRotation, Format-RotationReport, Invoke-SecretRotationValidator). Tests validate status classification, both JSON and markdown output formats, custom warning windows, and basic error handling (missing files, invalid JSON, invalid format). However, coverage gaps exist: no tests for empty secrets arrays, boundary conditions (daysUntilExpiry == WarningDays), malformed date strings, null/empty metadata, or special characters in names. Rigor is adequate for happy paths and basic errors but lacks edge case depth—some assertions use loose BeLike wildcards instead of exact matching, and the custom warning window test only verifies count changes, not granular status transitions. Design is clean with BeforeAll setup and independent tests, but test data is hardcoded/brittle (hardcoded reference dates with no parameterization), fixture management could be more sophisticated, and no cleanup helpers. Integration test relies on an undisplayed fixtures/secrets.json file. Overall, this suite would catch basic regressions and validates the core workflow, but lacks the rigor (boundary testing, comprehensive edge cases) needed to catch subtle bugs in production.
